figures.caption: Table 2: Measurement of diversity in individual genomic prediction models included in the ensemble models using the framework 811 of the Diversity Prediction Theorem. The mean value of each term in the Diversity Prediction Theorem was calculated for the days 812 to anthesis (DTA) and anthesis to silking interval (ASI) traits in the TeoNAM and MaizeNAM datasets. The ensemble error, average 813 error and prediction diversity represent the first, second and third terms in the theorem, respectively. In each dataset, “Mean” 814 represents the actual mean term value, whereas “CV” indicates the coefficient of variation for each term value. The sign “±” indicates 815 the standard error of each corresponding mean value. 816

Fig. 2: The variance components of each population in the TeoNAM and MaizeNAM datasets for the a) days to anthesis 835 (DTA) and b) anthesis to silking interval (ASI) trait. The relative magnitudes of variance components partitioned into 836 additive (blue), epistasis (orange) and residual (green) effects. 837
